description_long: This is a large, modern sectional lounge sofa with a deep navy blue fabric upholstery. The sofa is arranged in an L-shape with a chaise section extending from one end, providing ample seating for multiple people. The backrest and seat cushions are thick and plush, offering a comfortable and inviting appearance. The sofa features slim, straight metal legs in a dark finish, elevating the piece and giving it a contemporary look. The armrests are low-profile and integrated into the frame, maintaining a streamlined silhouette. The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or tufting.
description: A large, L-shaped navy blue sectional lounge with plush cushions, low-profile armrests, and slim metal legs in a modern style.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, chaise section, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the main seating area and the chaise's position.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple loose seat and back cushions arranged in an L-shape, with a chaise section; cushions are thick, uniform in size, and cover the seating and backrest areas.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with no visible segmentation or tufting, providing continuous support along the sofa's length.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; low-profile, straight armrests integrated into both ends of the sofa.
attribute_leg_style: Slim, straight metal legs with a dark finish, moderate height, and minimal decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid navy blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
